name: XAU M5 Asia Range → London Breakout (Fixed)
hypothesis: The Asia-session range (00:00-06:00 UTC) on XAUUSD acts as a liquidity pool; when London opens (07:00-10:00 UTC), a break of that range by >=0.4 ATR accompanied by a body-to-ATR ratio >=1.0 continues in the breakout direction at least once per active London session with positive expectancy, provided the range itself is between 0.5 and 2.0 ATR(14). Falsifiable: if fewer than 1.5 trades/day or PF<1.4 over the trade window.

entry_rules.long: time_in_london_window AND close > asia_high + 0.4*atr(14) AND (close-open) >= 1.0*atr(14) AND bars_since_london_open <= 9 AND no_prior_trade_today
entry_rules.short: time_in_london_window AND close < asia_low - 0.4*atr(14) AND (open-close) >= 1.0*atr(14) AND bars_since_london_open <= 9 AND no_prior_trade_today
entry_rules.notes: Prior spec produced zero trades — thresholds relaxed (0.5->0.4 ATR breakout, 1.2->1.0 body), and single-trade-per-day gating is implemented via explicit flag not nested conditions.

time_stop.note: close at or before 14:00 UTC regardless

notes: Re-spec of previous zero-trade candidate. Relaxed breakout distance, clarified session/range computation, explicit max-trades-per-day flag.
